values.content:
You are the BTC Layer 1 Direction Agent.

You must follow the supplied BTC logic document exactly.

You analyse BTC only.

You must not produce pair calls, trade recommendations, cross-asset calls, consensus calls, or Layer 2 event-adjusted calls.

You must not use technical analysis, chart patterns, support/resistance, RSI, MACD, moving averages, or indicator logic.

Use only the supplied market snapshot and supplied logic document.

If required inputs are missing, score the affected factor as NEUTRAL and clearly state the missing input.

Return valid JSON only.

Do not wrap the JSON in markdown fences. Do not include ```json. Return raw JSON only.

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(item => item.json);

const snapshot = rows
  .filter(r => r.snapshot_date && r.run_time_et)
  .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.run_time_et) - new Date(a.run_time_et))[0];

if (!snapshot) {
  throw new Error("No valid market snapshot found");
}

const availableInputs = {
  btc_price: snapshot.btc_price,
  btc_d1_pct: snapshot.btc_d1_pct,
  btc_d5_pct: snapshot.btc_d5_pct,
  btc_d20_pct: snapshot.btc_d20_pct,

  dxy_level: snapshot.dxy_level,
  dxy_d1: snapshot.dxy_d1,
  dxy_d5: snapshot.dxy_d5,
  dxy_d20: snapshot.dxy_d20,

  us_10y_real_yield: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield,
  us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps,
  us_10y_real_yield_d20_bps: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield_d20_bps,

  fed_bias: snapshot.fed_bias,
  latest_us_event: snapshot.latest_us_event,
  upcoming_events: snapshot.upcoming_events,

  vix_level: snapshot.vix_level,
  vix_d1: snapshot.vix_d1,
  vix_d5: snapshot.vix_d5,

  nq_price: snapshot.nq_price,
  nq_d1_pct: snapshot.nq_d1_pct,
  nq_d5_pct: snapshot.nq_d5_pct,
  nq_d20_pct: snapshot.nq_d20_pct,

  gold_price: snapshot.gold_price,
  gold_d1_pct: snapshot.gold_d1_pct,
  gold_d5_pct: snapshot.gold_d5_pct,
  gold_d20_pct: snapshot.gold_d20_pct,

  btc_dominance: snapshot.btc_dominance,
  btc_dominance_d5: snapshot.btc_dominance_d5,
  btc_dominance_d20: snapshot.btc_dominance_d20,

  crypto_fear_greed: snapshot.crypto_fear_greed,

  total_crypto_market_cap: snapshot.total_crypto_market_cap,
  total_crypto_market_cap_d5_pct: snapshot.total_crypto_market_cap_d5_pct,
  total_crypto_market_cap_d20_pct: snapshot.total_crypto_market_cap_d20_pct,

  btc_etf_net_flow_1d_usd: snapshot.btc_etf_net_flow_1d_usd,
  btc_etf_net_flow_5d_usd: snapshot.btc_etf_net_flow_5d_usd,
  btc_etf_net_flow_20d_usd: snapshot.btc_etf_net_flow_20d_usd,

  stablecoin_supply: snapshot.stablecoin_supply,
  stablecoin_supply_d5_pct: snapshot.stablecoin_supply_d5_pct,
  stablecoin_supply_d20_pct: snapshot.stablecoin_supply_d20_pct,

  equities_regime: snapshot.equities_regime,
  global_growth_regime: snapshot.global_growth_regime,

  source_status: snapshot.source_status,
  collector_version: snapshot.collector_version,
  data_quality: snapshot.data_quality
};

const missingInputs = Object.entries(availableInputs)
  .filter(([key, value]) => value === null || value === undefined)
  .map(([key]) => key);

const btcInputPack = {
  agent_name: "BTC",
  layer: 1,
  isolation_rule: "This Layer 1 agent may only use this market snapshot. It must not read other agent outputs.",
  execution_question: "Based on confirmed value-driving factors available at execution time, what is the likely direction of BTC?",

  snapshot_id: snapshot.id,
  snapshot_date: snapshot.snapshot_date,
  run_time_et: snapshot.run_time_et,

  available_inputs: availableInputs,

  missing_inputs: missingInputs,

  missing_inputs_must_be_scored_neutral: [
    "btc_d5_pct",
    "btc_d20_pct",
    "dxy_d5",
    "dxy_d20",
    "us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps",
    "us_10y_real_yield_d20_bps",
    "fed_bias",
    "vix_level",
    "nq_d5_pct",
    "nq_d20_pct",
    "btc_etf_net_flow_1d_usd",
    "btc_etf_net_flow_5d_usd",
    "btc_etf_net_flow_20d_usd",
    "btc_dominance",
    "btc_dominance_d5",
    "btc_dominance_d20",
    "crypto_fear_greed",
    "total_crypto_market_cap_d5_pct",
    "total_crypto_market_cap_d20_pct",
    "stablecoin_supply",
    "stablecoin_supply_d5_pct",
    "stablecoin_supply_d20_pct",
    "latest_us_event",
    "global_growth_regime"
  ]
};

return [{ json: btcInputPack }];
